fab_section_md:
- King on the Iron Throne; the High Septon dissolved the Faith Militant in his name and Maegor set bounties on unrepentant members — a gold dragon per Warrior's Son, a silver stag per Poor Fellow. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:15)
- He was reconciled with his first wife Ceryse at Oldtown, sealing it with a feast and a "second consummation." (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:19)
- Riding Balerion, he slew his nephew Aegon at the battle beneath the Gods Eye, then followed with half a year of trials and executions. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:59)
- He destroyed House Harroway root and branch, questioned his nephew Viserys to death, massacred the Red Keep's builders, and began the Dragonpit. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:115)
- He took three widows to wife in 47 AC, the "Black Brides." (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:183)
- He was called "Maegor the Cruel" and "kinslayer," and died childless upon the Iron Throne after a reign of six years and sixty-six days. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:247)
- He died childless. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:249)
identity_line: Maegor I Targaryen — King on the Iron Throne; the High Septon dissolved the Faith Militant in his name and Maegor set bounties on unrepentant members — a gold dragon per Warrior's Son, a silver stag per Poor Fellow.

fab_section_md:
- Pentoshi mistress of whisperers; she wrote to warn Maegor of secret talks with Alyssa, and revealed that Alys's child was not his seed. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:87)
- She was given Queen Alys to torment, and later confessed under threat to poisoning the queens' children in the womb. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:205)
- According to report, Maegor slew her himself with Blackfyre and fed her heart to his dogs. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:209)
identity_line: Tyanna of the Tower — Pentoshi mistress of whisperers; she wrote to warn Maegor of secret talks with Alyssa, and revealed that Alys's child was not his seed.

fab_section_md:
- Widow of Aenys; she remained on Dragonstone with Jaehaerys and Alysanne as prisoners in all but name. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:77)
- After Visenya's death she escaped Dragonstone with her children, the dragons Vermithor and Silverwing, and stolen Dark Sister. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:105)
identity_line: Alyssa Velaryon — Widow of Aenys; she remained on Dragonstone with Jaehaerys and Alysanne as prisoners in all but name.

fab_section_md:
- Son of Aenys and Alyssa and the rightful heir by law, he was expressly disinherited by Maegor. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:195)
- At fourteen he was proclaimed king at Storm's End, unsheathed Dark Sister, and rode the dragon Vermithor. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:215)
identity_line: Jaehaerys Targaryen — Son of Aenys and Alyssa and the rightful heir by law, he was expressly disinherited by Maegor.

fab_section_md: - Daughter of Aenys and Alyssa; a maid of twelve who commanded her own dragon, Silverwing. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:215)
identity_line: Alysanne Targaryen — Daughter of Aenys and Alyssa; a maid of twelve who commanded her own dragon, Silverwing.

fab_section_md: - Eldest surviving son of Aenys and Alyssa; summoned to court and made Maegor's squire under a Kingsguard shadow. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:77)
identity_line: Viserys Targaryen — Eldest surviving son of Aenys and Alyssa; summoned to court and made Maegor's squire under a Kingsguard shadow.

fab_section_md:
- Queen Alys, daughter of Lucas Harroway; in 44 AC she lost her child, a deformed monster. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:85)
- Her father had sent men to father her children; she was given to Tyanna and her body cut into seven parts and mounted on the city gates. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:99)
identity_line: Alys Harroway — Queen Alys, daughter of Lucas Harroway; in 44 AC she lost her child, a deformed monster.

fab_section_md:
- Hand of the King and father of Queen Alys; he sent men to his daughter's bed to get her with child. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:87)
- He was flung from the roof of the Tower of the Hand. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:95)
identity_line: Lucas Harroway — Hand of the King and father of Queen Alys; he sent men to his daughter's bed to get her with child.

fab_section_md:
- Maegor's first wife and sister of Lord Hightower; reconciled with him at Oldtown. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:19)
- She died of a sudden illness. A rumor, which most maesters now hold a slander, said Maegor had Ser Owen remove her tongue and her throat was slit. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:117)
identity_line: Ceryse Hightower — Maegor's first wife and sister of Lord Hightower; reconciled with him at Oldtown.

fab_section_md:
- Lady of House Westerling and widow of Alyn Tarbeck, to whom she bore a posthumous son; taken as a Black Bride. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:175)
- Three moons early she bore a monstrous stillborn child and did not long survive it. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:199)
identity_line: Jeyne Westerling — Lady of House Westerling and widow of Alyn Tarbeck, to whom she bore a posthumous son; taken as a Black Bride.

fab_section_md:
- Lady of House Costayne and widow of Ser Theo Bolling, mother of three sons; taken as a Black Bride at nineteen. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:177)
- She bore an eyeless winged stillbirth in 48 AC and later found Maegor dead upon the Iron Throne. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:211)
identity_line: Elinor Costayne — Lady of House Costayne and widow of Ser Theo Bolling, mother of three sons; taken as a Black Bride at nineteen.

fab_section_md: - Lord of Storm's End; he proclaimed Jaehaerys the true king and was named Protector of the Realm and Hand. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:215)
identity_line: Rogar Baratheon — Lord of Storm's End; he proclaimed Jaehaerys the true king and was named Protector of the Realm and Hand.

fab_section_md: - A bearded brute crowned "High Septon" by the Poor Fellows; he roamed the realm preaching against the king and led thousands toward Oldtown. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:135)
identity_line: Septon Moon — A bearded brute crowned "High Septon" by the Poor Fellows; he roamed the realm preaching against the king and led thousands toward Oldtown.

fab_section_md: - Woman leader of the Poor Fellows; betrayed by three followers, declared a witch, and burned alive by the Wendwater. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:129)
identity_line: Poxy Jeyne Poore — Woman leader of the Poor Fellows; betrayed by three followers, declared a witch, and burned alive by the Wendwater.

fab_section_md: - Sister of Jon Piper and Rhaena's girlhood friend; she led the Piper levies in man's mail and died at the Gods Eye. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:35)
identity_line: Melony Piper — Sister of Jon Piper and Rhaena's girlhood friend; she led the Piper levies in man's mail and died at the Gods Eye.

fab_section_md: - New Lord of Fair Isle, whose father and elder brother died fighting for Aegon; he gave Rhaena sanctuary at Faircastle. (fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p03:65)
identity_line: Marq Farman — New Lord of Fair Isle, whose father and elder brother died fighting for Aegon; he gave Rhaena sanctuary at Faircastle.
